review_text: 非常棒！

The Krusin Kombis team had an absolute blast staying at Lakeside Forster! We brought our vintage Kombis along for a wedding and the park was the perfect host — beautiful grounds, great facilities, top notch all round. If you're getting married nearby, hit us up at Krusin Kombis — and make sure you book this park while you're at it! 🎉🚐
Really enjoyed our stay. Can't wait to visit again
Nice location on the lake good pool for the kids, the amenities toliet  were always dirty
Fantastic park with such friendly staff. Great grounds w huge sites. And the pool is heated!
Beautiful lake
Perfect stay, park was immaculate,  cabin was as new, best cabbin I have stayed at. Staff friendly relaxed welcoming and nothing was a problem. Highly recommend.
Really nice little park with HUGE sites 👌🏽 Definitely recommend

The location being by the lake is fantastic, but it lacks basic facilities especially for kids. The playground and the pool  are very small and mainly suitable for toddlers, which limits it's appeal for older children. There are also no simple additions like a trampoline, community hall or other engaging activities, making it hard to stay entertained for more than a day, particularly for families with kids.
Fabulous caravan park clean and great size sites, lovely pool area. Little drive into town but courtesy buses will collect.

Family friendly park with heated pool and small toddler playground. The sites were fantastic and large. Only downfall was the wild dogs attacking our garbage during the nights as we were unaware that this was the reasoning. Maybe advise guests not to leave their garbage bags/bins outside during the evening, other than that a long waste hose is a must.

Having stayed here before we were very disappointed in the condition of the site we were allocated the grass needed mowing and there was a huge dirt patch in the middle of the site
The free Wi Fi advertised was out of reach and could not be used
The pre arrival email check is a nightmare to use and ultimately did not work
Otherwise the park is clean and quiet

Premium waterfront site 14. Big site on lake…beautiful sunset.
Located near laundry and toilets.
Great camp kitchen and bathrooms a few minutes away.

The  ladies in the office were very helpful when we were booking in for our stay, lovely park well maintained and caravan sites mowed and level. Easy to launch my kayak from the foreshore . We got to see the deer early in the morning on low tide walking through the water to the other island . We will be back.
Love the place always been a great place to stay  and only getting better
The friendliest place , kids enjoyed the cabins were amazing balcony was spacious with a bbq this was  awesome , staff were very accomodating for special needs children

Had a lovely time at Lakeside Forster Holiday park. We camped at an unpowered campsite for 3 nights. Location was great, only a short 7 minute commute to the main shopping centre. Reasons for not giving a 5 star. They may have been in the middle of upgrades, but the ablution block closest to us was closed for the whole time, so it was a longer walk to the facilities. Also we had no working tap near our site as I think they were installing new ones too, so it was a walk for water too. Other than that, the kids loved the pool, and everything was pretty neat and well laid out. Kitchens oven could have been cleaner though.

I have been camping here past four months start here the staff have been more than accommodating for me during my stay. I was staying in powered and unpowered sites. Thank you for everything and I’ll see you next time
Amazing service, great vibe throughout the park and cabins were perfect! The sunsets over the lake are sensational. The entire park is well kept with grounds nicely maintained.
We stayed one night with a caravan, the sites are large, the facilities are great and very clean, the view at sunset is magic

Great spot! Sadly we visited when there was construction right beside us. The lake is amazing to sit by at dusk. Showers are very small (where you stand to shower) with a big step behind you as you shower so have to be mindful not to step backward.
Lovely staff, would be a peaceful location when construction is done.
Great value.

The park is very tidy and well maintained. The pool is beautiful.
Unfortunately the premium lakefront site we were given for our van was along a swamp site that was very smelly. A tradie told us as we were packing up that he was supposed to be coming out to clean it up. Big job ahead of him. We hope this improves the 'lakefront' atmosphere.
Lovely accommodation, great views of the lake and awesome friendliness from staff during our short stay!

I stayed on a premium riverside powered site. Direct access to lake with amazing sunsets, but beware, the lake is a little smelly.
Close to toilet and laundry amenities.
I didn’t receive details for late checkin but the onsite caretakers were able to assist and easily sorted.
We enjoyed our stay on site 48 with the owl in the tree to keep us company. We hope he gets a new mate soon.
Great accomodation and affordable. Staff lovely. Park amenities were lovely. Heated pool is fantastic!

We love it there .. Had a couple of big family holidays here .. This time there was  30 of us ranging from older adults to toddlers .. something for everyone .. The waterfront units were great perfect spot place  to watch the sunset |Lots of fish caught too |We will be back
Large van sites. Very clean park. Friendly staff. Peaceful location. Great pool and camp kitchen.
Absolutely stunning, 100% would go again. Only good for summer

Would return, good clean park
Close to town but far enough out to make you feel away from it all, good amenities
Fairly priced

Stayed at Lakeside Forster with a large group of family. I cannot be happier with the accommodation and am already looking to book again for next year but for a longer stay.

We stayed in the 6 sleeper lakeside cabin and it was absolutely amazing. Waking up to the serene view of the lake was simply breath taking.

Bed was comfortable and cabin was remarkably clean on check in.

Park facilities were well maintained and staff were extremely friendly and responsive to enquiries.

As a family of 4 we were placed at the rear of the park, no wifi as stated, on a site that was mainly dirt and covered in heavy machinery tracks, pine needles, seeds and sticks, and backed on to a disgusting smelling sewerage outlet/tidal creek. Requested contact with the manager, was not forthcoming, not even a phone call. $80 a night. Plenty of other sites appeared available, that were in better condition. Facilities unclean, doors to toilets unable to be locked, has gone rapidly downhill since our last visit 2 years ago. We will never be back

Upon entering by the time I looked up was doing 9k/h as I hit the 8km zone, the owner a lady indicated to slow down which I did straight away but then she proceeded to stop us and gave us a mouthful, rude which wasn't required and think they need to change their ways they communicate and be accommodating.

We had a wonderful stay at Lakeside Forster. The view from our balcony overlooking the lake was stunning, and the staff were incredibly kind and welcoming. My partner and I even got engaged during our visit what a memorable experience! Might just be our new place to come celebrate anniversary’s 🤍

Thank you Lakeside Forster Holiday Park, the managers’ the office staff and the groundsman were all very welcoming and friendly, the grounds, amenities and the pool area is all well kept, perfect. Wifi worked great throughout the park. will definitely be returning.
This place is awesome! We arrived late on Friday night to find out heat pump on and the cottage was noice and warm. Nice and clean facilities!
Excellent park,the cabin was fantastic overlooking the lake, friendly staff, great amenities. Will definately go back and stay again.

I recently stayed at the Lakeside Tourist Park in Forster and had an overall very pleasant experience. We booked one of the water-view cabins, which turned out to be a great choice for a family getaway.
The cabin was well-equipped with everything needed for a comfortable stay. It included a full-sized fridge, microwave, and full cooking facilities, making self-catering a breeze. It easily accommodated our family of six without feeling cramped, and the water views added a peaceful and relaxing touch to the overall atmosphere.
While prices in the area can often be on the higher side, I managed to secure a good deal on this stay, which made it excellent value for money.
One minor design choice that stood out was the separation of the toilet and shower into two different rooms. While not my personal preference—I would have liked a single, combined bathroom—I can understand the practicality, especially for families with children who may need flexibility.
The biggest downside was the internet. The Wi-Fi near our cabin was extremely weak to the point of being unusable, and mobile reception wasn’t much better. While the cabin had a smart TV, it wasn’t much use without a reliable connection. Installing Wi-Fi extenders or improving network coverage across the park would be a welcome improvement.
Despite the connectivity issues, our overall experience at Lakeside Tourist Park was very good. It’s a well-maintained, family-friendly location that offers comfort, convenience, and scenic views. With just a few upgrades, it could be even better.
Lovely caravan park, right on the lake. Cabins have all the facilities you need. Will come again.
Staff were great, camping by the lake was awsome. Lots of rain meant lots of mud, but still highly recommended.
Great little park, very reasonable rates and extremely helpful staff. Quiet and peaceful and right on Wallis Lake. Definitely recommend and look forward to staying again!!

What a wonderful stay! Staff were extremely helpful and friendly from the beginning, and the lakeside cabins are in such a beautiful spot. Fantastic amenities, beautiful view and comfortable beds with large showers. Wish I could’ve stayed longer but will be booking again one day!

Lakeside Foster Holiday Park is amazing. Just out of town very quiet, lots of bird life.
The cabin was very comfortable with either bbq or stove to cook on.
Management were fantastic keeping us upto date on what was happening in Park, also letting us know the cabin was cleaned and we could arrive early. Thankyou Managers for your friendly service.

This is a great park. Check in was quick and easy. Accommodation wise I can only speak for the Poolside Cabin as this is what we booked. The cabin was spacious, clean and had a full kitchen, even with a dishwasher. The coffee and tea provided was a nice touch. The price was unbeatable and location within a stone’s throw of the centre of Forster. The beds were SO comfy! The park is quiet at night in a secluded area which made for a great night’s sleep.

The park’s kitchen and toilets were clean and well appointed.

We would 100% stay here again.

Honestly this park was so lovely, I really liked that is was abit smaller then most parks but had amazing facilities-heated pool, great playground, swimming & fishing at my front door. Our cabin was clean and very well equipped, beds comfy too.
We can't wait to come back and have been recommending to everyone!

My daughter and I stayed for 2 nights,  beautiful location for our visit to the area.  Our cabin had everything we could need at a very reasonable price.  Staff were friendly and helpful,  and other guests were friendly.  We'll definitely be returning next time we visit the area

We were greeted by Natasha on arrival and rescued by Paul when we got bogged on a soft grassed area.

They were there to help without any fuss. We enjoyed staying here and will definitely stay here in the future.

Very clean & manicured holiday park. Staff/owners so accomadating & friendly.
Great park on edge of lake. Highly recommend.
Quiet, spacious, very clean and comfortable and plenty for the kids to do. Short drive into town. Lovely staff. We will be back again.

Great park with great amenities very family oriented I took my small van to an ensuite site it was around $50 for the night absolutely perfect roasting hot shower and very clean my friends stayed in lakeside cabins they were modern and very well equipped

Great spot on the lake.  Staff very helpful as the car battery died and gave a jump start. Stayed in a cabin. A bit cold at night as the air conditioning is located near the dining area, so heating does not reach the bedrooms. The grey water pump was noisy late evening.

AMAZING!!! We had a group of about 20 people stay at this park. The staff were very accommodating and booked us in adjacent cabins. The cabins were exceptionally clean and easily accessible - some with ramps and disability showers. The heating was sufficient for the cold June weather and the bedding was soft and warm. Great parking, with the space to park either 2 cars or a car with a boat trailer at each cabin (very handy for big group stays). The atmosphere was homey with plenty of things to do for the kids and adults. Great location, right on the lake and not too far from town. We will absolutely be staying again and have nothing bad to say about this property.
Best ever

Great view of the lake, directly behind the unit.
Pleasant to view with a coffee.

מקום מקסים על האגם🌟
תמורה מעולה למחיר (27 דולר אוף סיזן), מטבח ענק ושירותים אישיים נקיים🩷

Curtains and blinds are filthy manager claims they have been steam cleaned, tv in bedroom only gets every other channel asked to be corrected was told switch tv on & off power point to try reset & wouldn’t be addressed until day 3 of 5 day stay. Porch light also wasn’t working until day 2. Dust build up was ridiculous on fans, power cords, picture frames and cob webs around ceiling.

We stayed over Easter and while the location has the potential to be beautiful, our experience was impacted by the heavy rain. The poor drainage and limited slab sites meant we were completely washed out—our mat (on its first use) was ruined, and we lost a lot of clothing to the wet and mud. The amenities, while functional, were quite dated, and with only three showers and five toilets per gender, they really needed more than one clean per day to keep up, especially with all the mud.

On the bright side, the pool was lovely and heated, the park itself was fun, and the basketball area was well maintained. The go karts were a hit and added a lot of fun to the trip—we did our best to make the most of it.

A couple of things to note for future visitors: there are a lot of crows around, and since the park is completely lakeside, we were extra cautious with our kids near the water. Despite the challenges, it’s still a beautiful spot, but we’d suggest a different location if the weather looks wet.

I was going to give this place a bad review until Manager Simon redeemed the place and turned it into a 5 star review. Initially called and spoke to a male staff member who was rude when I was enquiring about filling up my water tanks. Checked in after hours but due to the rain, our site was completely muddy and boggy. Spoke to Caretaker Andrew (lovely bloke) who allowed us to stay in an upgraded site (powered waterfront site). Initially stated that I would have to pay extra $$ for the upgrade at my disgust. Received phone call from Manager Simon the following day. He was a very lovely bloke and came in on his day off just to sort out the issues from the rain. Simon allowed us to stay in the upgraded site for the duration of our stay at no extra cost. We were extremely appreciative to Simon for this. Met him on the last day and he was a top bloke. Park is nicely located and facilities are good. Only issue is with lots of rain this place is extremely boggy.
Great place to visit.Love the lakes and beaches. Kids love to spend time in the swimming pool.

Great place to have a holiday. Cabins are cosy and neat. View and lake JUST at your doorstep!
The pool is basic but they need some signs in the pool to show the level change as we had a couple of incidents with feet clashing on the pool floor.
Activity room is boring but it wasn't my impression that it was in use.

Forster Lakeside Park is an excellent place to stay for a vacation. Close to local shops, tourist attractions, activities for kids, beaches and wildlife.

You can see dolphins swimming in the river. Sunrise from any beach is awesome.

We have been coming here during our trips from Adelaide to Qld for many years.On our last trip we decided to buy one of the new houses being built there.To say we're happy is an understatement
Love the whole area.

The sunset villa no.11 was absolutely disgusting and not recommending this at all for the money we paid was not good enough!
I requested management to review was told ‘it’s fine to open the windows and allow air in’. Mind you it was pouring rain and could not leave windows open. The bedroom slept like wet carpet and very musky. The over all cabin smell was extremely strong chemicals as if it was bleach. Mind you I had my 2 year old with me and obviously could not keep him in here straight away until opening the windows for a few hours while the rain stopped.
The smell continued to linger the whole time.
I went and purchased my own glen 20 to help this. The stove top did not work I asked a neighbour to come and help me however couldn’t get it to work until she got her lighter and tried that way and it worked. Now i do not smoke if I didn’t have her next door I wouldn’t have been able to use this stove which would have then wasted my food. The wifi internet did not work at all! The light above the dining table did not work and the cabin had multiple little black ants. The flooring was putrid my son had a shower and would walk out in the living/dining and his feet were black by the end of it. The management said to me that they could possibly move me to another sunset villa however would likely be the same with the smell.. I said not to worry however did offer to go to another villa and pay the difference but apparently this was sold out. I then stayed the night and packed up and left the next day. Only stayed the night due to travelling 7 hours from Gold Coast. I have then since requested a refund for compensation. The management have refused and have been extremely rude about this. I would not recommend staying in the sunset villas they are so outdated, poorly managed and disgusting! Not worth the price. This location was also very far on the other side of Forster not near the cafes etc only the Stockland shopping centre.
Had a wonderful time
Beautiful doggie friendly caravan park, with a lovely pool. We had a little van, little pooch and an ensuite site. We will definitely come back.
Great friendly place to stay

Not to good if had heavy rain most sites a boggy mess. Ours was OK 67 but friends with us was under water.
Also watch out for the dingo, got into camps took food. Was no warning from the reception on booking in and no signs, bit of a worry if have kids or small pets..  Good clean kitcheneoth bbqs. Other amenities showers toilets etc could do with a bit more attention. 2nd time here won't go back.
Bedside lamp would be nice and another full length mirror .. we were there for a wedding and only mirror was in bathroom

Beware of the Dingo! The staff didn't mention to us or other campers we spoke to that there was a Dingo hanging around, some campers said it took food from their camp and another a packet of chips out of their tent! We were next to the camp kitchen if got in there made a mess. I think when campers booking in they should be warned. They were aware of it as I went to tell them and they said they knew.
Good site size. However some sites after the rain were left like a muddy swamp like our friends who eventually got moved only to have to move again because staff put them on a site that was booked by someone else. Staff could of been more helpful with their situation. Our site 67 was OK after the rain, and next to the kitchen which is well equipped and clean. Other amenities not so good could do with a bit of TLC and a touch up. Your asked to leave the amenities clean after you, however there's no mop etc for you to clean up like many parks we have been. Camp is a fair bit out of town. This was our second time here probably won't be back again.

What a lovely holiday park! The amenities were amazing, well positioned and well kept and the cabins comfortable and clean. The location was great too - easy distance to anything you might need! Above all the staff were friendly and helpful from booking to exit.

This caravan park was beautiful to stay at, amenities were great the camp kitchen had everything needed for cooking. They replace the sponges and cleaning cloths daily, also fresh tea towels daily. The office Ladies were very accomodating. We would stay again if we travel that way.

Didn't enjoy our stay. Be mindful if you're going when any wet weather, most of the park is a bog hole! No attempt to improve sites. Eg a load of road base would make a huge difference. Literally walking around in mud and water. A rogue dingo was also a concern especially with children and pets. The biggest concern was the lack of pre warning, no signage, to a point of negligence. Room for improvement in a lot of areas. Won't be back and wouldn't recommend it.
Great location and well maintained units

The Lakeside Forster Holiday Park is a lovely place, conveniently located near shopping center and stunning beaches. The staff are kind and welcoming, with a special mention to Alyssa—she is brilliant, helpful, responsible, and always goes the extra mile to resolve any issues.

Away from all the food outlets,  however, if you prefer a quieter stay,  it's only a short drive away.
Only negative feedback was the double bed in the waterfront cabin, which felt too soft and collapsed.
Camp kitchen was next level, never seen anything like it, it had everything from ovens & stoves to BBQ grills , including an encolsed seating area for large families or groups.
The park was very clean and well maintained with friendly service and staff.  Beautiful views over the lake on sunset

Great pool. Great view.
Lot of space.
But, houses need renovation.

Took our caravan for a weekend.  Had an issue with being able to make it in our original date and they let us move to the next day.  Facilities were fine, not as clean as some, but good.  Bbq facilities were really good.

We had a lakeside powered site, which was beautiful. Even though it’s a large park, it is quiet, well laid out, plenty of shade, and the sites are large and not crowded together. Amenities are clean, place is away from traffic noise. Would stay again!

Nice big sites. Staff friendly enough. Amenities abysmal. We chose a site close to an amenities block only to find out there were no showers only toilets. Have never stayed in a caravan park where the amenities block had no showers. We had to walk a fair way and their were only 3 showers each for male and female. When busy as it was on the weekend we stayed you have to wait for ages for a shower, totally inadequate. The last 2 nights of our stay we couldn't get anywhere near the camp kitchen, it had been completely overtaken by groups with no consideration for anyone not in their group. It was also the first caravan park we stayed in that had no television reception. Our site turned into a swamp after heavy rain.
What a beatifull place with friendly staff and great cabins. Thanks for this experience.

Fantastic location in a quiet part of Forster. Not too far from main CBD but far enough out to enjoy the peace . Staff were exceptional, very friendly and always cheerful especially a lovely lady with dark hair who greeted us on arrival and check-out.
Cabins along the lake front were exceptional and great for the little travellers to run around whilst relaxing on the verandah and enjoying the calm of the afternoon. Highly recommend and will definitely be back. Thank you!
What a great spot. Small campground with well grassed sites and all the amenities you need. I would be happy to stay here again.

Having avoided caravan parks in the past, and only camping off-grid, we were hesitant to book a couple of sites at Lakeside Forster for the whole family so we could attend a family celebration in the region, travelling from Brisbane. We hate the crowds and we have a 52kg maremma sheepdog with us. However, from start to end, our experience at Forster Lakeside was delightful. The staff were exceptionally friendly and helpful, and the amenities were clean and well-situated. The waterfront views could not be beaten, and the sites were very generous in size. We were on sites 20 and 21. The caravan park is only a very short drive to the local shopping centre but far enough away to escape the hustle and bustle. Lakeside Forster Holiday Park is such a lovely, quaint and quiet park on weekdays, and is even quite pleasant with the extra guests on the weekend. All of the residents and guests were friendly and keen for a chat. Just beautiful vibes all round. This caravan park is now our go-to and solution for visiting family, in one of the most beautiful places in Australia, if not the world. Thank you so much, Lakeside Forster, for a wonderful experience! We'll be back!
Great location, and check in could not have been easier. The ensuite camp sites make camping 1000x more enjoyable! Great location and everything you need for a family getaway.

Unfortunately, a wet stay. We were in a caravan, only 3 female showers available.
Our lake view site was more of a creek!
But the area near the lake made for great sunset photos
Great place for a holiday
Very clean park. Another  shower toilet block would be great.

All the staff here are friendly & very
helpful.If you need any help just ask.
From the moment you enter it's quiet,  relaxing & has beautiful views of the Lake.The Amenities are kept lovely & clean.The park grounds are well looked after & the Van/Camp sites are big & grass.There's also some ensuite sites with slabs.A big & well equipped Camp Kitchen.A great variety of Cabins for any size family or number of guests.Great swimming pool, play area & a few Karts.Lovely to walk around & look at Lake views.It's not far to shops.We would highly recommend staying here.Enjoy your stay.
Great location away from the main township.  But beside the lake.
Absolutely beautiful. Great spot right on the water, friendly staff and clean spacious cabins. Highly recommend!
Very nice location next to the lake, but it's very cold in winter with the wind coming of the water

Stayed in a cabin right on the lake easy to fish or take a stroll and watch the sunset well maintained amenities. Big under cover bbq area kept clean.kids loved the pool and plenty of room for them to ride their bikes

Fantastic place to stay! We came up from Canberra for our son to play in a tennis tournament.
There was so much rain & we had issues with our motor home & the mud, but the wonderful lady in the office & the maintenance man helped us out so much! Lovely people & a beautiful place to stay. We'll be back.
Working in the area for 3 weeks, would recommend the accommodation & service.
Great holiday location with amazing scenery.

My Granddad is a permanent resident at this park, so we come up often with the kids. The park is beautiful with great staff. The park is always clean and tidy. The pool is heated, so still good in the colder months. The rooms are beautiful and tidy. They could do with a little update, but honestly, for cabins they are great. My taste is just a bit fancier. I did enjoy staying in the cabins when I did though. We had one with a spa bath - highly recommend 🙂
It's only a small park, but still a good size, especially if you're looking for a more chill holiday.

Beautifully kept park on the lake, management and staff are just amazing nothing ever an issue.

Close to Stockland shopping centre yet feels a million miles away.

We had another wonderful stay at Lakeside Forster Holiday Park having returned after 13years.  The location is about 10mins out of the main town which was fine for us as the view of the creek and lake are worth it.
As campers we had access to all that we needed with an outstanding indoor kitchen and bbq area, a groomed camp area, impeccably clean toilet, shower, games and pool facilities. The staff were incredibly nice and helpful to all of our needs and so warm in every interaction. A completely perfect score of 10/10! We will definitely be back!!

We loved this park right on the lake, the caravan sites were very spacious and the park is extremely well maintained.  We opted for an ensuite site which made life a bit easier and it was situated under beautiful trees with table and benches nearby.   Very friendly and helpful owners.  Would definitely return.

Used a powered grass site for our caravan which was very sodden, almost swamp like because of rain. The sites need to be raised or add concrete slabs to get you out of the wet and mud. TV Reception and WI-FI was very poor. Owners need to spend some money on powered sites.

My experience was as though a nightmare.
Racial slurs from the moment we checked in from the other visitor's, not to forget to mention the unreasonable treatment of staff members stemming from management.
We were harassed by a particular person who thought that it was reasonable to come to our cabin and racially abuse us, we have audio recording on our dashcam of which management were not interested in listening to in order to resolve/defuse the situation.
The website boldly suggests a Dog Friendly Park.
We drove 3.5 hours with our shmoodle puppy who is too young to stay home alone only to find out that puppies are only welcome in the caravan spots. After apologising for the misunderstanding perhaps not realising the fine print they made us feel soo uncomfortable and awkward that we ended up leaving one day into our weekend stay. Management made Zero attemp to provide alternative options reasonable, or sum-what accommodating.
Appon arrival we noticed that the kitchen drinking glasses were covered in finger prints and crusty to touch.
The bedroom ceiling fans had a collection of dust.
Than they took the liberty of withdrawing an additional $200 cleaning fee because our our puppy which was present only for a short time and our stay was less then 24 hrs long.
Beautiful location
Magic views, Great spot to unwind
We love this place. Return each year for the last 6 years. Great views, good size sites and quiet.
Best Park we have been in big sites very clean amenities the grounds are kept in top condition and prices are reasonable compared to other Parks we have been to would highly recommend it to anyone
Massive  caravan sites close to the water in a nice quiet part of town & the  shopping centre is close. Facilities in Park are excellent with great service
Wonderful place, lovely staff

Over the past five years, we have had the most incredible experience at Lakeside. This place has become a second home to our family, thanks to its incredibly family-friendly atmosphere. The staff consistently go above and beyond; their helpfulness and professionalism make our stays unforgettable.

Our love for Lakeside has expanded to include six other families from Sydney who now join us regularly. The bonding and memories we've created here are priceless, and we're already planning our return visits for years to come.

Thank you, Lakeside, for being our go-to destination for unforgettable family moments and for consistently providing an environment that feels like home away from home.

I would have loved to have given this place 5 stars as we really enjoyed our stay. Loved the lake especially and the beautiful evenings over looking it. Nice grassy areas to stay on and very clean amenities. Staff were also lovely and very helpful. The only downside was the overpowering smell that came from the small water inlet near our site. It was quite revolting and gag inducing and we would love to stay again but will definitely be choosing a different site.

Lovely holiday park in terms of set up/sites/location. The sites are grass, the view is great, and the bay is perfect for paddle boarding. The shower block is really clean too, with toilets and washing up area average in cleanliness.

However, there is an awful smell that comes from the creek that settles over sites 15 and 16 particularly badly. It reeks of rotten eggs, and usually smells during the night until midday. Would recommend the park, just not those sites :)
I was only there for looking for home for sale
Had an ensuite site, great shower, big site. Friendly helpful staff.
Perfect location, fantastic view, fantastic staff, I booked and changed a few times due to plan change, they all very patient and helped me out !! Best experience !
Beautiful large site and didn’t feel cramped with other campers. Overall beautiful site.

we stayed 3 days and just loved the location and the large grassed site was awesome
lovely clean amenities .
Loved the location and the Park was extremely clean.  We had an ensuite (with our caravan) and it was excellent.  Thank you so much.

From the moment we booked to the time we drove out the gate, nothing but wonderful staff, great and clean amenities, large sites, extremely well maintained grounds and excellent communication. Debbie was so helpful (we had to change booking dates) then organised a late check-in for us on the day of our arrival. The only thing they didn't do was set up and pack up our van!!!! Can only give 5 stars 🌟 but would give 10 stars 🌟 if possible. Highly recommend staying here. Thank you Lakeside Forster for an enjoyable stay.  ❤️

Beautiful place with large sites, nice amenities and wonderful staff, I would recommend this place no problems.
Grounds are well looked after 😀
Beautiful location nice and clean facilities good service and awesome place for couples and families.
Had an amazing stay here, everything was really clean and everyone very friendly. Wish we could have stayed longer.
We had a powered site, lovely smallish park with a lovely pool and camp kitchen.  Great internet
Camp ground clean and well kept. Big sites. We were next to the camp kitchen which was not ideal. But all in all nice place to stay.

Beautiful location, we were on a caravan site with water views of the lake, sites are large and grassy and  the park has a relaxed vibe. Staff were friendly, amenities clean and we didn’t feel like we were on top of each other. Sunsets out the back were the highlight and the location to town and Seal Rocks was a bonus.
Beautiful location great facilities great staff

This is the second time we’ve stayed at this Park.
The staff are very friendly, accommodating and went above and beyond to help with our specific needs.
Very reasonably priced, clean with tidy grassed sites.
Thank you, we’ll be back!!
We love this park. the facilities are amazing.

We stayed on a very roomy caravan site and the helpful checkin lady was very friendly and welcoming. At the time we arrived we were given a couple of options as to which site we would like. The amenities were kept clean too.
We were in a caravan. Had a lovely big site close to the lake. Nice quiet
Loved it here! Clean, a little out of town but we tow a small car so saw everything

The facilities on the Lake are run down and need to be upgraded and extended in size. They are not large enough to cope when the park is full.

Additionally some of the sites need work as they easily flood after rain.

Overall it is a well maintained and beautiful park with large sites.

We had a two night stay on power site which was easy to access. I found the amenities very clean and tidy.
A very good place to stay.

We had a great stay at the Lakeside Caravan park. The location was pretty by the lake, quiet and the van sites were big and easy to park. It’s not far from Stocklands Mall for shopping and only 10 minutes into Forster centre and the lovely main beach. The grounds are well maintained and very tidy. Highly recommended.
Had a very good stay. Would have been better though with better TV reception, that was terrible.

We loved our stay we had 4 caravans all parked side by side. The sites are massively generous so you don’t feel like your on top of each other
For the amount of people that were in the park over the weekend the amenities remained pristine.
Pool and playground is so good for little ones and bigger kids!
10/10 recommend this park
Was very happy with the park will stay again
Loved it. The lady at the desk was so helpful as well. Would definitely come back
We stayed in this lovely park Beautiful clean cabins and the camp kitchen is very big and the whole stay was great would definitely stay again
Excellent all round camping resort clean friendly and reasonably priced will be going back and highly recommend
Couldnt rate the rooms as we rented a site ,but can say what a lovely, clean and family oriented park right next to the water and not jammed up in town.

We had a weekend stay ,in the 3 bedroom villa  , it was very clean  ,everything available including a dishwasher  ,and a bbq . The villa opposite the pool .The Park was well maintained and had a relaxed family feel.We will be back for sure 😊
Excellent park, the kids had a blast! Our cabin was clean and well maintained and the kids loved the pool.  Staff we all super friendly. Thank you for our stay, we will definitely be back

Fantastic stay at the lakeside Forster holiday park. We stayed with a tent at one of the ensuite sites and a powered site. Amenities were clean and I appreciated the clean cloths and tea towels in the kitchen area. Sites were lovely and spacious, the staff were friendly.

Absolutely stunning. Very well maintained park. We had a powered site with lake views which was really beautiful.

Great pool area for the kids. Amenities block I could not find fault with as far as functionality,  cleanliness and convenience. Cost of our site was reasonable for off peak and the cabins onsite looked quite reasonable too. And free wi-fi if you want it!

All the staff we came across were delightful and welcoming. Expect to see wildlife! We saw 3 deer daily that would wade out into the water as well as a couple of dingos, yes actual dingos as well as the usual swans, pelicans and heaps of bird life including the old bin chickens!

I keep my 5 stars for places my wife and I REALLY enjoy and this park was definitely one of them.

Really recommend this park if your looking for a spoil.

Just got back from staying here on a powered site which was HUGE and grassy. Lovely staff and clean amenities. Loved having a good shower head and a massive camp kitchen equipped with detergent and tea towells, kettle, toaster, fridge and multiple bbq’s. Friendly and helpful staff too. Bonus it’s dog friendly in the off peak season. I slept like a log, very quiet spot. Thanks for the great stay!
What a beautiful caravan park, great location, great service. Definitely recommend.
Clean and tidy park with large powered sites. Nice and quiet. Limited but more than adequate amenities l
Relaxed, spacious,  and well maintained. I want to visit again to explore more around.

It’s a great place and very accommodating to all ages if you have older kids and little kids. The place was clean and spacious, would definitely recommend staying here and looking forward to future stays there. Thanks
Cabins were very clean. Family loved the trip. Will definitely be staying there again.
Affordable price and Nice location

Absolutely loved our stay here. Fully met our needs and the staff were more than accommodating.
Kids club 10/10
Needs a lot of maintenance and cleaning

Just a brilliant park for us and the kids. Nice grass play area and amenities. I would give 6 stars if I could if they turned the pool up a few degrees. We were all excited it was a heated pool but its still pretty cold

Nice van park,large sites 👌 heated swimming pool 🏊‍♂️🏊‍♀️
Helpful, friendly staff 👌

Great holiday park, the facilities are really good and the cabins were clean and supplied everything we needed. The kids loved the heated pool and basketball court too.  We definitely will be coming back.
Have visited this park for over 16 years, have witnessed the change from a bit boring to a very comfortable place to stay. The staff are friendly and great to deal with, “thanks to Nat”.

This is the second time we stay here. The place is gorgeous. Just a couple of steps and we are on the beach. It was low tide in the morning and sea birds came nearby to feed. It was so enjoyable and relaxing to watch them. Last time we went was high season, but the price was much lower. It would be great if they gave discount to return customer.
An absolutely stunning location to have a caravan park.  Impeccably maintained, clean amenities, and a fantastic view.
Need more things to do for children. In the games room. A few paddle boats for hire as the lake is at your  back-door.

This is in such a wonderful location just outside Forster and on the shores of Wallis Lake near Piper Bay. Lots of great camping sites or cabins. Nice large caravan sites, good camp kitchen and amenities.  The staff are very friendly and helpful.

We love this park
Great for the kids
Very relaxing looking over the lake. Everyday

I’ve been at the Lakeside Forster Holiday Park for the past 5 days staying in the accessible room where the toilet and shower area worked great for me and the rest of the room was also great I had no problem cooking a meal for myself and daughter the room was clean and tidy and the staff were all very nice and friendly and I would stay there again

Very nice Holiday park.
We had an ensuite powered site that met all our needs.
Staff were friendly and supportive of any of our needs.
We had no lights in the camp kitchen area on Saturday evening, so a quick call to the help line and this was sorted in 10 minutes.
Overall a cold and windy stay thanks to the Artic blast.
Location to the lake and Forsters  main shopping centre very close made for a great stay.
Pool and kids area looked very nice
Kids area off reception with video machines and a pool table.
Beautiful team and a wonderful place to stay. Will be returning.
Great caravan park. Lovely big sites and close to shopping centre
Caravan sites are large and flat close to lake

Very easy check in, Debbi had called to confirm my arrival and had everything I needed. She was super friendly and helpful encouraging me to use all the facilities. The park is one of, if not the best parks I’ve stayed in. The ensuite was immaculate and given that I was working late was a perfect choice and excellent value. I am looking forward to going back for leisure 😊
Had a rest time.   Quiet well kept clean park.  Very spacious and grassy blocks.   Very friendly office staff

Fantastic place to stay with family and friends.
Close enough to everything but far enough away to enjoy the quiet.
Clean and tidy cabins with great facilities, ample walking opportunities and wildlife.
Will definitely come and stay again.

Really lovely location right on the lake. The wildlife was abundant and it had nice open spaces to hang out. We were there for a family birthday and were nice and close to each other.
Some of the fittings and fixtures around needed updating or servicing  - ie the light over the bbq area didn’t work and the bathrooms could have done with an update.
No shower curtain meant that water sprayed straight on the floor… not ideal.
Everything was really clean though and gardens were kept nice. Staff were friendly.
100% would stay again.
Very quiet place for a stopover
What a great park! Huge sites, well maintained facilities. Kids loved the pedal cars. Whole family loved the heated pool. Beautiful location and close to the shops. Will definately be back.
Quiet, comfortable accommodation perfect for our two night stay as a stopover on our Aussie Road trip. Beautiful views of the lake , perfect for watching the gorgeous sunsets/sunrise.

We stayed in an ensuite powered van site.
We had a picnic table to share with the people who had the ensuite next to us. Neither of us used it but it would be good if you were travelling with others to dine together.

The facilities were all clean and tidy. The location is picturesque! The staff were so kind, helpful and generous. We loved that we did not need to put a code in to get in and out. The kids had a blast on the playground and in the heated pool.
Our one regret is we didn’t take our kayaks or stand up paddle boards. The van park is right on the water and there is  a large area of shallow water in front of the park perfect for water activities and especially for the kids.
Maccas and KFC/Woollies,BCF etc are just a 5 minute drive towards town.
Overall we loved it at Lakeside Van Park.
We have stayed in many van parks and have our favourites. We are already planning our next getaway here😊😃
Also, this place is dog friendly in low season.
A very pretty and peaceful park with great amenities. Friendly helpful staff and we got a great mid-week deal to boot. The sunsets on the lake were spectacular!
Large van sites, very well maintained

Stayed at an ensuite site for 3 nights May 23 to 26th 2023. The park was a credit to the managers and staff. Will defiantly be back.

We arrived back at this park on the 31st of July and stayed for 4 nights at a different en-suite site. Did not disappoint. The sites are enormous, the amenities well maintained and the grounds a credit to the managers and staff. By far the best park we have stayed at our entire trip.

- Family of 4.
- 2 Kids under 2.
My experience was amazing! It started with booking the wrong dates.. Special thanks to Debbie and the team! Fixed it up for me with no extra charge and the on the day of check-in allowed us to check in early, which was a huge blessing for us as our bubbys slept the whole 3.5hour drive and we’re starting to get hungry and fussy.
We have the Bayview room with spa bath! The cabin was clean, well equipped (please note does not have oven just stove) and have spacious considering. Bed are on the softer side for those who prefer firm mattresses.
The amenities were great! ($2 and $1 operated) Pool is heated and the playground is great!
My daughter’s favourite thing was the lake!! And all the ducks you are greeted with in the morning! Collecting a few shells she just absolutely looked seeing everything!

I stayed three nights on lake front power site. The site is pretty large, amenities were good. Pool was nice. Couple of minutes drive to shopping village. The free wifi is a bonus. Had to check in late, the reception staff is very friendly, they gave me a call as well as text with check in instructions. Overall we had fantastic time.
Stayed on a powered site near the river. A great find just outside of Forster. Peaceful and serene surroundings. Highly recommend.

The owners, Kerry and Don were absolutely wonderful when we encountered last minute problems with our campervan. We were able to get credits from our previous booking and received alternate accommodation with them.Thank you for the help you gave so we could have happy memories with our family during our stay. Michelle & Mark
best location for water sports
Large van sites grass, great camp kitchen, staff friendly and helpful, we will stay again
My four grandchildren and I loved it. Lovely bungalow, beautiful scenery little ducks been fed beautiful Pool  just a lovely atmosphere

Lakeside Forster is one of our favourite "runaway" places where we go whenever we have the chance. Always staying in a lake front villa, this was our first time with a caravan in a ensuite site. From the moment we arrive to the moment we leave we are made feel so welcomed and helped if needed. The ensuite site was extremely clean and accessible. It really is the perfect destination for everyone of any age. The park is clean for kids, the pool is heated (and clean) so can be utilised all year round, has buggy cart hire to ride around the park and a (very clean) laundry available. Location is accessible to everything whether it be bush tracks, beaches, towns or shops and the view.. well you can't get anything more beautiful or peaceful! (plus they have the best sunsets EVER!)
The caravan sites are the biggest ever been on, lush grass
nice,clean and quiet area ....
Absolutely loved it with family.

Loved this park. Facilities were all close to all sites, the sites were lovely green grass and very clean. We weren't on the water but I think it would get quite windy so we were very happy with where we were. Staff were lovely and friendly
Great place to stay.  Friendly. Great service. Extra large van/ camp powered sites.  Will definitely be back i the warmer weather.
You would not be disappointed great park highly recommend
Lovely clean campground.  Peaceful and quiet.  Large well looked after caravan sites.
Very clean park,good sized sites,nice roomy ensuite,nice and quiet when we were there.Nice views across the lake.Will definately be back.

This has been the best caravan park we've stayed at during our 11 months on the road. Immaculate grassy sites; clean amenities and very friendly welcome by Deb. We'll definitely return here and stay much longer.

We had a poolside cabin.
Modern, clean and more than enough space.
The park itself was amazing.
Everyone is friendly, the grounds are kept to perfection, the playground was a winner for my daughter.
As a whole, our stay here was  exactly what we needed.
Definitely a must to come again.

Thankyou.
Good place , quite location, very clean
